Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to be followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion compared to the duration of SW-Checklist Completed within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in variants that include both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and activity Plagiarism Originality Report Completed for cases where activity Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurs

Name: Average time until SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion is succeeded by any checklist-related activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completed)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Reject versus those leading to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Minimum waiting time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to the next non-systemic decision point (e.g., SW-Awaiting AE Assignment)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment grouped by final editorial decision (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision, SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and the first occurrence of a reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection) in variants where review proceeds
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection for cases where activity SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurs

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission in variants where co-author creation occurs after submission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission for cases where activity Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission occurs

Name: Total time for SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion phase in high-performance variants (performance < median) versus low-performance variants (performance ≥ median)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and the end of the case

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to the end of the initial submission phase (defined as reaching either SW-Awaiting AE Assignment or Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants that do not include checklist delay notifications
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time until SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion transitions to a revision track (e.g., SW–Major Revision due in 1 month) versus direct rejection or acceptance paths
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'", 'end': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 month'", 'aggregation': 'average'}"
